ai_summary: Here's an executive summary of the document:  Clean Science and Technology Limited's promoter group has completed an off-market inter-se transfer, via gift and without consideration, of 18.86% of the company's equity shares. This internal restructuring primarily moves holdings from individual promoters to family business trusts, is compliant with SEBI regulations for such promoter group transfers, and does not alter the overall promoter control or beneficial ownership of the company. No red flags are apparent, as this is a standard wealth management or estate planning exercise within a promoter group.
